artifacts/lab_simulation/.reason: Phase-specific artifacts live in the ARIS project workspace, not in this governance repository. This repo tracks governance state only. Artifact paths in CONTEXT_INDEX.md are reference routes, not local file claims.

versioning_contract.active_context_version_meaning: Version of the active-context governance system architecture. Incremented when the governance model itself changes structurally.
versioning_contract.increment_active_context_version_when: the governance model or canonical architecture changes fundamentally
versioning_contract.increment_schema_version_when: schema field set changes, validation rules change structurally, or new required fields are added
versioning_contract.schema_2_1_change_summary: Refactored from phase-snapshot const schema to structural evolutionary schema. Const retained only for permanent invariants (canonical_repository, canonical_branch, canonical_live_state_file, canonical_schema_file, additional_live_state_sources_allowed, canonicality_rules booleans). All phase names, status strings, and mutable authorization flags use type/enum constraints instead of const.
versioning_contract.schema_version_meaning: Version of ACTIVE_CONTEXT_SCHEMA.json validation contract. Incremented when the schema structure, field set, or validation rules change.
